rationale: Initial seed from Phase 0.5/1 hard-gate tuning (see docs/replay-2026-04-w17.md). Re-evaluated by monthly-recalibration first Saturday of each month.

rs_3m_hard_floor.note: block names with 3M return below SPY

rs_20d_hard_floor.note: block names underperforming SPY by >10pp over 20D

trend_bear_cross_tolerance.note: SMA20 must be >= SMA50 * this; 0.99 = allow 1% bear cross

drift_threshold_pct.note: below this drift % of equity → HOLD instead of trim/top-up

breakout_planner_active.note: When true, build_diff_plan will use breakout-trade-planner's worst-case-risk entries for VCP-tagged candidates. Keep false for ≥3 sessions of dry-run review before flipping.

fixed._note: Changes to fixed params require an architectural decision, not a monthly tune. Update CLAUDE.md alongside any change here.
